notes: Architecture review green. One new module (onboarding.py) + edits to pages.py (additive templates) + serve_platform.py (new routes + first-visit gate). 3 modules touched, within CTO autonomy. No new PyPI dependency -- consumes F006 credentials for storage. First-visit redirect gate is opt-in via enforce_onboarding_gate parameter on make_handler -- default off so Sprint 0 tests keep the old contract; main() flips it on for non-localhost binds.
review_criteria: First-visit gate defaults off in make_handler -- keeps Sprint 0 unit tests unchanged
main() explicitly flips both install-token gate AND onboarding gate on for non-localhost binds
All /api/onboarding/* routes exempt from the install-token gate because they run before an install token exists
